title: Agent-Network Audit Envelope
description: Versioned, hash-chained, Ed25519-signed envelope for all L1-L7 + MODELINV primitive audit logs. cycle-098 Sprint 1 — IMP-002 (HIGH_CONS 875), CC-2, CC-11. Sprint 1A lands the schema + basic write/read/chain-walk; Sprint 1B adds Ed25519 signing (additive minor bump 1.0.0 → 1.1.0); cycle-102 Sprint 1 (T1.2) adds MODELINV primitive_id + model.invoke.complete / class.resolved / probe.cache.refresh event types (additive minor bump 1.1.0 → 1.2.0; SDD §4.4 ASSUMPTION-3 RESOLVED Option B). Per-primitive retention defaults — L1 panel-decisions: 30d, L2 cost-budget-events: 90d, L3 cycles: 30d, L4 trust-ledger: 365d (immutable), L5 cross-repo cache: 7d, L6 handoffs INDEX: 90d (then archive), L7 SOUL surface: no retention (operator content), MODELINV model.invoke: 30d (chain_critical: true). See .claude/data/audit-retention-policy.yaml for normative values.

schema_version.description: Semver. Sprint 1B (cycle-098) writers emit 1.1.0 (additive minor bump from 1.0.0 added signature/signing_key_id per IMP-002). Sprint 1 (cycle-102, T1.2) writers emit 1.2.0 (additive minor bump from 1.1.0 added MODELINV to primitive_id enum). Breaking-change rev bumps major; additive bumps minor. Forward-compatibility note: readers running schema 1.1.0 will REJECT primitive_id=MODELINV — operators MUST upgrade reader code (audit_emit lib + audit-query.sh) to schema 1.2.0 BEFORE any 1.2.0 writer runs.

primitive_id.description: Which primitive emitted this entry. MODELINV (cycle-102 Sprint 1, T1.2) records model invocation lifecycle events — model.invoke.complete, class.resolved, probe.cache.refresh — and powers vision-019's M1 silent-degradation audit query.

event_type.description: Primitive-specific event type. Sprint 1 defines L1 events; Sprints 2-7 extend.

prev_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of canonical-JSON of prior entry's content (excluding signature + signing_key_id). 'GENESIS' for first entry in a log.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (base64) over canonical-JSON of {schema_version, primitive_id, event_type, ts_utc, prev_hash, payload}. Reserved in Sprint 1A; populated by Sprint 1B.

signing_key_id.description: Writer identity slug; key file at ~/.config/loa/audit-keys/<signing_key_id>.priv (private) and .pub (public). Reserved in Sprint 1A; populated by Sprint 1B.

payload.description: Primitive-specific event payload. Validated by per-event-type schema (out-of-scope for envelope schema). additionalProperties: true per IMP-001 — primitives extend additively without forking the envelope.

redaction_applied.description: List of pattern-ids redacted in payload (e.g., ['anthropic_api_key', 'github_pat']). null if no redaction. SKP-008 NFR-Sec8.
